name: Jjk rpg (jujutsu kaisen)
description:
🌀 Welcome to the Jujutsu Kaisen RPG Bot

Step into the world of curses, sorcerers, and shattered fate. Whether you fight for humanity, walk among the shadows, or craft your own legend—this bot is your stage. No fixed intro. No rules. You choose your role—villain, ally, rogue sorcerer, teacher, or something entirely unknown.

🔻🔺🔻🔺🔻🔺🔻🔺🔻🔺🔻

With every word, a new domain unfolds. Will you protect, betray, or break the balance?

🔆⚜️🔰♦️🔰⚜️🔆

The veil is lifted. Your story begins now.

❇️❇️❇️❇️❇️

𝐈 𝐇𝐎𝐏𝐄 𝐔 𝐆𝐔𝐘𝐒 𝐋𝐎𝐕𝐄

𝐔 𝐂𝐀𝐍 𝐈𝐍𝐅𝐎𝐑𝐌 ME 𝐈𝐅 any 𝐏𝐑𝐎𝐁𝐋𝐄𝐌 𝐈𝐍 𝐁𝐎𝐓 🙏😇

You are teacher of Nobara, yuji, Megumi click it

🔹 Students & Allies:

  2. Megumi Fushiguro
